shape.description: Pin both sponsored text ads AND their headline anchor so a re-save can't silently drop the ad card or the role=heading the classifier reads. Keep the injected Ukrainian location extension in the HTML — it is the chrome the top ad's Russian body would lose to under a whole-card read.

nodes.note: Top-rail (#tads) Russian sponsored ad; Google's injected Ukrainian location extension (address + weekday hours + visit count) must NOT flip it to Ukrainian. Classified on its Russian headline alone. Selected by the stable #tads container, NOT the per-render data-hveid value.
Bottom-rail (#tadsb) genuinely Ukrainian sponsored ad — kept.
